title: Palantir, Hyundai Collaborate In A Deal Worth Over $25M

Hyundai Heavy will use Palantir's data analysis software to improve the way its affiliate groups operate in fields including shipbuilding, offshore engineering, and energy and industrial machinery processes.

PLTR, -1.94% announced Wednesday plans to expand to South Korea, as it collaborates with Hyundai Heavy Industries Group 329180, +2.46% to build a bid data platform Hyundai's businesses, including shipbuilding and offshore engineering. title: Palantir To Partner With Hyundai Heavy Industries For Big Data Platform
text: Data analytics firm Palantir Technologies Inc. (NYSE: PLTR) and South Korea's Hyundai Heavy Industries Group (HHI) would establish a big data platform for HHI Group's core businesses. What Happened: HHI Group said that the company and Palantir will jointly build a big data platform for the group's key affiliates related to shipbuilding, offshore engineering, energy and industrial machinery processes.

title: Why Palantir Technologies Shares Are Falling
